response.justification: Sarah is a talented software engineer with strong leadership and architectural capabilities, but she lacks the core technical requirements for this role. The position requires 8 years of C++ programming; her professional C++ experience spans only 6 months (2014-2015), with recent career trajectory focused entirely on TypeScript/JavaScript. Additionally, her cloud infrastructure and distributed systems experience, while relevant, falls short of the production-level compute platform architecture expertise demanded. Her strengths lie in full-stack development and team leadership in different technology domains, not systems programming or cloud-compute infrastructure.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with demonstrated expertise in TDD, CI/CD, architectural patterns, and mentoring across multiple organizations
Proven track record leading and owning complex technical initiatives (GISCollective, Dunnhumby microservices handling millions of requests/sec)
Clear ability to establish engineering best practices, coding standards, and collaborate effectively across teams
concerns: Severely insufficient C++ experience (6 months vs. 8 years minimum required); career has diverged to full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript development
Limited depth in cloud infrastructure, distributed systems architecture, and compute/hardware specifics required for platform engineering
No demonstrated experience in technical leadership roles mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers in production cloud environments
